stemHtml: What are the flight training requirements for a candidate enrolled in the CPL(A) integrated course?

options.a: No less than 150 flying hours in total, with the option of up to 5 hours being instrument ground time across the full course.
options.b: No less than 200 flying hours in total, with no allowance for instrument ground time.
options.c: No less than 150 flying hours in total, with no allowance for instrument ground time.
options.d: No less than 200 flying hours in total, with the option of up to 10 hours being instrument ground time across the full course.
